sql.if: AND (A.ROUGHMAPSJ LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%') OR A.ROUGHMAPADDRESS LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT A.ROUGHMAP_ID AS roughMapId , A.ROUGHMAPSJ AS roughMapSj , A.ROUGHMAPADDRESS AS roughMapAddress , TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lastUpdusrPnttm FROM TB_ROUGHMAP A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.ROUGHMAP_ID DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ROUGHMAP A WHERE 1=1

SELECT ROUGHMAP_ID AS roughMapId , ROUGHMAPSJ AS roughMapSj , ROUGHMAPADDRESS AS roughMapAddress , LA AS la , LO AS lo , MARKERLA AS markerLa , MARKERLO AS markerLo , INFOWINDOW AS infoWindow , ZOOMLEVEL AS zoomLevel , FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm FROM TB_ROUGHMAP WHERE ROUGHMAP_ID = #{roughMapId}
